acceptance_notes: Inventory reconciled against current official Epic Pass region/Europe/Japan/Australia/partner pages and current official Ikon destination page on 2026-05-19.

Mike Wiegele Heli-Skiing was removed from the current Ikon inventory because the visible official Ikon destination page did not list it.
